01-billing-pipeline.json.notes: Stripe subscription webhook → update DB to Pro → Telegram notification.

02-failed-payment-recovery.json.notes: Stripe failed-payment webhook → Telegram + Resend email → 24h wait → downgrade if >=4 attempts.

03-sentry-alert-routing.json.notes: Sentry webhook → severity filter → fatal/warning → Telegram.

04-daily-backup-verification.json.notes: Cron 03:00 UTC → Railway API latest deployments → Sanity SQL check → Telegram OK/CRITICAL.

05-renovate-pr-auto-handler.json.notes: GitHub webhook → Renovate PR → auto-approve patch / Telegram review needed.

06-mono-webhook-enrichment.json.notes: Mono webhook → Claude AI categorize → monthly budget check → Telegram alert if over ₴15K.

07-morning-briefing-push.json.notes: User push workflow; requires product approval before activation.

08-weekly-financial-digest.json.notes: Weekly AI digest; token usage must be monitored before production activation.

09-habit-streak-alert.json.notes: User engagement push workflow; keep inactive until notification policy is approved.

10-debt-receivable-reminder.json.notes: Debt reminders; keep inactive until debt schema and push copy are verified.

15-railway-deployment-notify.json.notes: Railway webhook notifications. Active; webhook path /webhook/railway-deploy. Railway-side wiring is per-project: Project Settings → Webhooks → Add URL https://n8n-production-09ac.up.railway.app/webhook/railway-deploy → Save → Test Webhook. Required on humorous-eagerness (sergeant-api) and grateful-nurturing (n8n). See docs/integrations/railway-vercel.md §8 for full procedure incl. event-type reference and cleanup of stale rules.

16-posthog-daily-metrics.json.notes: Daily 09:00 Kyiv → PostHog HogQL (count pageviews + uniq distinct_id) for yesterday → Telegram. POSTHOG_HOST defaults to https://eu.i.posthog.com when unset; POSTHOG_API_KEY must be a Personal API key (phx_…) with project read access. Until env vars are set on n8n Railway the workflow sends a graceful Telegram alert pointing at the missing config.

17-github-pr-stale-alert.json.notes: PR hygiene reminder. Active; cron fires Mon–Fri 10:00 Kyiv against skords-01/sergeant open PRs > 48h.

18-nightly-security-audit.json.notes: Nightly security audit status report. Active; cron fires daily 04:00 UTC against the .github/workflows/nightly-audit.yml run history; alerts only if latest conclusion is failure/cancelled.

19-db-health-report.json.notes: DB health report. Active; cron fires Mon 07:00 Kyiv. Sequential chain (DB size → Top tables → Slow queries → Format → Telegram) with executeOnce=true on chained postgres+code nodes. pg_stat_statements may be absent and is tolerated via continueOnFail.

30-ai-memory-daily-digest.json.notes: Daily 09:05 Kyiv → SELECT з ai_memories (rolling 24h totals + per-source breakdown + lifetime) → Telegram #digest. Aggregated only, без user_id у тексті. Voyage cost — rough estimate з total chars (chars/4 tokens × $0.02 / 1M). Активуй у self-hosted n8n після того як ingestion-flag-и (наприклад MONO_AI_MEMORY_INGEST_ENABLED) вмикнуть і таблиця почне наповнюватись.

60-growth-funnel-snapshot.json.notes: Daily 02:30 Kyiv → PostHog HogQL count distinct users per funnel step (visit/signup/onboard/first_action/paid) for yesterday → POST /api/internal/growth/funnel (mig 019, growth_funnel_daily) → Telegram summary. POSTHOG_HOST defaults to https://eu.i.posthog.com; POSTHOG_API_KEY must be a Personal API key (phx_…). PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL defaults to https://api.invalid.local so the workflow proceeds gracefully on missing env. POST /api/internal/growth/funnel uses onError=continueRegularOutput so a Telegram alert is always sent. Required PostHog events: $pageview, signup_completed, onboarding_completed, first_action_completed, subscription_started — until instrumented, non-visit steps will read 0.

63-growth-acquisition-snapshot.json.notes: Daily 02:35 Kyiv → PostHog HogQL count signups by ($utm_source, $utm_medium, $utm_campaign) for yesterday → POST /api/internal/growth/acquisition (mig 019, growth_acquisition_daily) → Telegram top-5 channels. POSTHOG_HOST defaults to https://eu.i.posthog.com; POSTHOG_API_KEY must be a Personal API key (phx_…). PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL defaults to https://api.invalid.local so the workflow proceeds gracefully on missing env. POST /api/internal/growth/acquisition uses onError=continueRegularOutput so a Telegram alert is always sent. spendCents/cacCents stay 0/null until ad-platform integration is wired (Google Ads, Meta, etc.).

98-error-handler.json.notes: Global n8n error workflow. Configure as the Error Workflow in n8n settings.

99-heartbeat.json.notes: n8n liveness heartbeat (every 3 hours) with email fallback.
